case_title: JESSICA ROMERO VS. FOUR FIFTY SUTTER PHARMACY INC., A CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMERO, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT FOUR FIFTY SUTTER PHARMACY INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPOPRATION CHAN, ELAINE AN INDIVIDAUL
